name: access-kit
description: API-first and CLI-first ReBAC control plane foundation for ATO-ready access governance.

scripts.validate: pnpm typecheck && pnpm validate:contracts && pnpm validate:sample-policy && pnpm validate:automation && pnpm validate:ci && pnpm validate:packaging && pnpm validate:release-packaging && pnpm validate:deployment-manifests && pnpm validate:persistence-deployment && pnpm test
scripts.validate:contracts: pnpm validate:schemas && pnpm validate:openapi && pnpm validate:policy && pnpm validate:connector-security && pnpm validate:cli-contract
scripts.validate:docs: tsx scripts/validate-doc-links.ts && tsx scripts/validate-doc-runbooks.ts && tsx scripts/validate-doc-examples.ts && pnpm validate:api-reference
scripts.ci:check: pnpm validate:contracts && pnpm validate:sample-policy && pnpm validate:docs && pnpm validate:automation && pnpm validate:ci && pnpm validate:packaging && pnpm validate:release-packaging && pnpm validate:deployment-manifests && pnpm validate:persistence-deployment && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm evidence:check
scripts.security:pass: pnpm audit --audit-level high && git diff --check && pnpm ci:check
